events.whatsappContent:
*AFC Asian Cup Qualifiers (Singapore vs Bangladesh)*
Venue: NSD
Date: 31 Mar 2026

*Event Info*
3:00PM: GATE 18 MEDIA DOOR (FAS STAFF)
4:00PM: BOX OFFICE @ KALLANG WAVE MALL OPEN
4:30PM: PROMENADE LOCKDOWN
5:30PM: PCS OPEN
6:00PM: CUSTOMER CARE @ 18 IN OPERATION / TICKET RESOLUTION @ GATES 6 & 18 IN OPERATION / GATE 19 MEDIA ENTRANCE OPEN
8:00PM: MATCH STARTS
9:00PM: TICKET RESOLUTION @ GATES 6 & 18 CLOSE
9:30PM: MERCHANDISE BOOTH CLOSE
9:45PM: MATCH ENDS
10:15PM: CUSTOMER CARE @ GATE 6 & 18 CLOSE / GATE 19 MEDIA ENTRANCE CLOSE
12:30AM: GATE 18 MEDIA DOOR (FAS STAFF - CLOSE)

*Conditions of Entry*

NOT ALLOWED:
- Outside food and drinks
- All glassware and glass bottles
- Water bottles (except glass bottles) are to be emptied before entering the venue
- Bags exceeding 30cm x 40cm x 40cm
- Flags above A3 size but below 2m x 1.5m will be allowed
- Loudhailers, musical instruments, and additional large displays (e.g. flags and banners exceeding 2m x 1.5m) are subjected to pre-approval by
